name: orchestrator_eval
description: Multi-turn evaluation dataset for the orchestrator agent. Tests routing accuracy, tool use, and response quality across all specialist agent types.

evals.name: weather_routing_basic
evals.description: Orchestrator should route weather query to weather_agent

parts.text: What is the weather in London today?

conversation.reference: The orchestrator should delegate to weather_agent for weather queries.

evals.name: research_routing_basic
evals.description: Orchestrator should route research query to research_agent

parts.text: Research the latest developments in quantum computing.

conversation.reference: The orchestrator should delegate to research_agent for research queries.

evals.name: code_routing_basic
evals.description: Orchestrator should route code execution to code_agent

parts.text: Write and execute Python code to calculate the first 10 Fibonacci numbers.

conversation.reference: The orchestrator should delegate to code_agent for code execution tasks.

evals.name: agent_status_tool_use
evals.description: Orchestrator should use get_agent_status tool when asked about agent availability

parts.text: Is the weather agent currently running?

conversation.reference: The orchestrator should use get_agent_status to check agent availability.

evals.name: multi_turn_routing
evals.description: Multi-turn: weather question followed by research question

parts.text: Now research the best time of year to visit Tokyo.

conversation.reference: Routes research query to research_agent in the same session.
